case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JAIME HOFFMAN TORRES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, JAIME HOFFMAN $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF ADDRESS VERIFIACTION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFESON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MS. NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JAIME HOFFMAN TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
